name: Meet Kevin
contentStyle: Recent Video: THE CRASH BEGINS | DO THIS NOW. Bio: Hey everyone, Meet Kevin here! I want you to always remember one thing about me: I BELIEVE in "providing more" in everything. ALWAYS provide more. I’m a dad of 7 amazing kids and have been with my incredible wife for over 16 years. Family is my anchor.  I thrive on learning, growing, and giving back. I’ve built my career on mastering the tools of success and helping others do the same. That’s why I’ve earned a diverse range of licenses to expand what I do and deliver value at every opportunity. I’m a licensed real estate broker and financial advisor.  I’ve spent the last 15+ years studying markets, investing, and building businesses, but I’m just getting started.  See ya soon! Kevin

name: Graham Stephan
contentStyle: Recent Video: I was wrong about buying real estate...wasn't worth it. Bio: As a 34 year old real estate investor who started working in real estate shortly after turning 18, with over $120,000,000 in residential sales since 2008, I've created this channel to share my successes, failures, and experiences in real estate, personal finance, and investing news. I'm also obsessed with frugality and credit card churning...a lot. So Subscribe! Because all the cool kids are doing it.    Feel free to follow me on Snapchat / Instagram: GPStephan

name: Humphrey Yang
contentStyle: Recent Video: Roasting My Subscribers’ Investment Portfolios Featuring @GrahamStephan. Bio: Former Financial Advisor (Series 7, 66), Previously worked in Gaming. Explainers, Personal Finance, Reviews & More.  My friends would ask me finance questions all the time, so I made this channel so I could send them videos answering those questions. I love explaining things simply, and making it fun and easy. This channel is great for beginners and intermediates who are looking to build wealth, learn how to keep their wealth, and get better with personal finance, budgeting, and investing. I also focus a lot of self improvement and productivity, so if you're into that - I hope you stick around!  Partnerships inquiries - please email: humphrey@wmeagency.com

name: Timothy Sykes
contentStyle: Recent Video: 5 Signs You've Finally "Made It" as a Trader (Most People Miss #3). Bio: Join Tim's FREE Watchlist here: https://bit.ly/4hQXQyw  I'm Tim Sykes, a seasoned stock trader boasting nearly $8 million in earnings documented across two decades of trading. Through my Trading Challenge, I've proudly mentored several dozen students into millionaire traders, while providing countless others with a sense of community and expert guidance.  This channel was born out of my passion for giving back—whether it’s contributing to my charity, Karmagawa, or offering students the chance to learn without charge. For those interested in enhancing their trading journey, I invite you to access a weekly watchlist absolutely free. Discover how by following this link: https://bit.ly/4hQXQyw  Ready to elevate your trading game? Join a vibrant community of stock traders committed to growth in my Trading Challenge. Discover how you can be part of this transformative experience:
